_comment: Info-panel legibility demo (issue #836): a lone Cavalry troop is staged alone (drill mode, no opponent) at (700,380) facing east. It is selected, then given a Hold order in place, so the bottom-left unit-stats info panel (name/type/commander/soldiers/morale/fatigue/formation/width/order) sits on screen next to the Formation/Stance/Options control bar long enough to read every field, including the Order field changing from its default to 'Hold'. This is the panel HUD.gd's _info Label was failing to render legibly during a headless frame capture -- see _info_panel_raise()/_info_panel_lower() in scripts/HUD.gd for the fix (they were repositioning the panel via `position`, which resolves anchors against whatever the parent size happened to be at the moment it was set, instead of the anchor-relative `offset_top`). Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
